concerns.text: The validation against STRING high‑confidence interactions (combined score ≥ 700) is not independent of the predictor because STRING’s high‑confidence set incorporates co‑expression evidence among its evidence channels. Using the same co‑expression signal both to generate predictions (Pearson r ≥ 0.8) and to judge them creates a circular/tautological validation, inflating AUROC/AUPRC and violating the independence requirement of scientific evaluation.
